narrative:
Aurélien Tchouaméni is a pivotal defensive midfielder for France at the FIFA World Cup 2026. His overall rating of 7.18/10 places him within the top 4% of defensive midfields at this tournament. This strong rating is a combination of 53% from his club form over the last two seasons and 47% from his World Cup performances across 270 minutes.

His defensive contributions are significant, averaging 4.333 tackles and 1.667 interceptions per 90 minutes at this World Cup. Tchouaméni also demonstrates offensive involvement, with 0.333 assists and 1.333 key passes per 90 minutes. However, his direct goal threat is minimal, reflected by an expected goals of just 0.022 and 0.667 shots per 90 minutes in the tournament.

Tchouaméni functions as France's midfield anchor, providing crucial defensive cover and enabling forward play. Scouts and fans should watch for his continued high volume of defensive actions and his ability to dictate tempo from deep. His consistent performance in breaking up play will be vital in France's remaining matches.
